prompt: {"type":"anime film storyboard sheet","style":"polished cinematic anime key visual board, professional presentation layout, clean white grid with dark navy header, highly detailed fantasy lighting, dramatic storm atmosphere, glossy promotional design","project":{"title":"劇場版『{argument name=\"film title\" default=\"蒼天の霹靂\"}』15秒CM 絵コンテ","tagline":"その雷鳴は、運命を変える合図だった——","duration_label":"尺：15秒"},"layout":{"format":"landscape storyboard page","sections":[{"title":"キャラクター設定（参照）","position":"left column","count":3,"labels":["主人公：カイト","ヒロイン：アオイ","ライバル：レオン"]},{"title":"① 0.0〜2.0秒　雷の覚醒","position":"top row, panel 1","count":1,"labels":["citywide lightning strike"]},{"title":"② 2.0〜4.0秒　主人公の予感","position":"top row, panel 2","count":1,"labels":["close-up of protagonist turning toward the light"]},{"title":"③ 4.0〜6.5秒　キャラ＆世界フラッシュ","position":"top row, panel 3","count":3,"labels":["hero profile","rival profile","lightning over city skyline"]},{"title":"④ 6.5〜10.0秒　雷×剣の覚醒","position":"bottom row, panel 4","count":1,"labels":["hero drawing a glowing sword"]},{"title":"⑤ 10.0〜12.5秒　静の余韻","position":"bottom row, panel 5","count":1,"labels":["two characters from behind overlooking the city"]},{"title":"⑥ 12.5〜15.0秒　タイトル＆公開日","position":"bottom row, panel 6","count":1,"labels":["title card with release date"]},{"title":"演出テーマ","position":"right sidebar","count":3,"labels":["見どころ","使用色・トーン","音の方向性"]}],"notes_rows_per_story_panel":4},"characters":{"count":3,"designs":[{"name":"{argument name=\"hero name\" default=\"カイト\"}","role":"male protagonist, age 17","appearance":"slim anime boy with messy dark navy hair and bright blue eyes, serious expression, long royal-blue coat with black inner layers, belts, gloves, fitted pants, tall boots, fantasy military accents","reference_views":3},{"name":"アオイ","role":"heroine, age 16","appearance":"slim anime girl with very long dark blue hair and blue eyes, white school-uniform-inspired coat dress, pleated skirt, red ribbon bow, dark stockings, calm melancholy expression","reference_views":2},{"name":"レオン","role":"rival, age 18","appearance":"tall anime boy with tousled silver-white hair, pale skin, white long coat with gold trim and layered formal fantasy attire, composed aloof expression","reference_views":3}]},"story_panels":[{"panel":1,"time":"0.0〜2.0秒","title":"雷の覚醒","image":"vast nighttime fantasy city under heavy storm clouds, a colossal bolt of lightning descends from a swirling break in the clouds and hits the city center, blue-white light reflecting across rooftops, epic scale","camera":"wide establishing shot","effects":"single massive flash, cloud vortex, electric glow"},{"panel":2,"time":"2.0〜4.0秒","title":"主人公の予感","image":"tight close-up of the protagonist in profile, face turned left toward off-screen lightning, blue rim light, wind-tossed hair, intense eyes, stormy sky behind him","camera":"slow push-in close-up","effects":"lingering thunder, subtle facial illumination"},{"panel":3,"time":"4.0〜6.5秒","title":"キャラ＆世界フラッシュ","image":"three vertical cuts: the protagonist in dark blue, the silver-haired rival in white, and a lightning-struck city skyline at dusk-night transition, fast montage feeling, strong contrast between blue lightning and pale character palette","camera":"three jump-cut inserts","effects":"electrical crackle, rapid flashes"},{"panel":4,"time":"6.5〜10.0秒","title":"雷×剣の覚醒","image":"dynamic action shot of the protagonist drawing or swinging a sword infused with blue lightning, body leaning forward, coat whipping in the wind, arcs of electricity exploding around him, almost full-frame white-blue flash","camera":"low-angle dramatic shot with slow-motion feel","effects":"metallic ring plus thunder impact"},{"panel":5,"time":"10.0〜12.5秒","title":"静の余韻","image":"rear view of two figures, the heroine on the left in white and the hero on the right in blue, standing side by side above the city at sunset-purple dusk, gazing toward distant glowing lights, emotional pause after the storm","camera":"pulled-back long shot","effects":"quiet ambient tone, reflective mood"},{"panel":6,"time":"12.5〜15.0秒","title":"タイトル＆公開日","image":"full-screen title card with stormy blue sky and lightning background, luminous Japanese film title in large glowing serif characters, centered release date \"{argument name=\"release date\" default=\"7.18\"} ROADSHOW\", elegant fantasy logo at the bottom right","camera":"static centered composition","effects":"title glow, residual thunder, sword-like light streak"}],"graphic_details":{"header_background":"deep navy","grid":"thin gray lines separating cells","body_background":"white presentation board","text_style":"Japanese production-board typography with small captions and labeled rows for 内容, カメラ, 音, セリフ/テロップ or ナレーション","sidebar":"bullet-point production notes in Japanese","footer_note":"small disclaimer text along the bottom edge"},"quality":"high-resolution, crisp print-like layout, balanced margins, exact storyboard-sheet appearance"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 动画电影 15 秒商业广告项目：生成一份精致的 15 秒日本动画电影商业广告项目，包含角色参考、六个分镜画面以及用于提案或视觉规划的制作备注。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, close-up, grid, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light, camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
